scripts.dev:workers: pnpm run prepare:quickjs-wasm && vite dev --config vite.workers.config.js --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.build:workers: pnpm run prepare:quickjs-wasm && vite build --config vite.workers.config.js
scripts.preview:workers: pnpm run prepare:quickjs-wasm && vite preview --config vite.workers.config.js --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000
scripts.deploy:workers:local: pnpm run prepare:quickjs-wasm && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:workers:action: bash -o pipefail -c 'pnpm run prepare:quickjs-wasm && npx wrangler deploy 2>&1 | sed -e "/workers.dev/d" -e "/https:\\/\\//d"'
